creator: culot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jesse,

thanks for submitting this update.
However, there seems to be missing an update to the pkg-plist too as shown
by the following tinderbox log:

http://people.freebsd.org/~culot/tinderbox/7.4-FreeBSD/SearchAndRescue-data-1.3.0.log

Could you please have a look at it?

Thanks,
culot@
